items.title: Arrowhead’s Redemplo secures Australian TGA approval for FCS therapy
items.summary: Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals has received approval from the Australian TGA for Redemplo to treat familial chylomicronemia syndrome.

items.title: Novo Nordisk to launch Ozempic for type 2 diabetes in US
items.summary: Novo Nordisk is set to launch Ozempic, its oral GLP-1 receptor agonist pill for adults with type 2 diabetes, in the US.

items.title: The cost of inefficiencies in clinical trials
items.summary: Estimates suggest fragmented technology can raise clinical trial costs by 45%, but a unified approach to clinical data management can enable efficiency.

items.title: How Saudi Arabia is developing as a Middle East hub for clinical trials
items.summary: Saudi Arabia is emerging as a major growth market for clinical trials in the Middle East, underpinned by strong funding and rapidly developing infrastructure.

items.title: Axsome receives FDA approval for Auvelity to treat Alzheimer’s agitation
items.summary: Axsome Therapeutics has received FDA approval for Auvelity to treat agitation associated with dementia due to Alzheimer’s.
